title: DAOx External Tool
description: A community-contributed external tool listed on the DAOx hub. One file per tool in data/external-tools/<id>.json. Keep this mirror in sync with lib/external-tool.schema.ts.

$schema.description: Path to this schema for editor autocomplete. Use "../external-tool.schema.json".

id.description: Unique lower-case kebab-case identifier, matching the filename (e.g. "stake-easy"). Never displayed.

description.description: One or two sentences on what the tool does and for whom.

categories.description: One or more categories. Drives the filter and the auto-selected icon.

inputs.description: Short formula-style inputs, segments separated by " · " (e.g. "ETH amount · Tier").

outputs.description: Short formula-style outputs, segments separated by " · " (e.g. "SSV/yr · USD").

host.description: Optional display host (e.g. "stakeeasy.xyz"). Derived from the URL when omitted.

featured.description: Maintainer-only. Pins the tool to the top of the list with a "Featured" pill.

sortOrder.description: Optional ordering hint within the featured / non-featured group. Lower sorts first.
